description_long: This object is a hand saw with a straight, toothed metal blade and a robust, ergonomic handle. The blade is metallic gray, featuring sharp, evenly spaced teeth along one edge for cutting wood or similar materials. The handle is primarily black and yellow, constructed from a combination of plastic and possibly rubber for grip, and is attached to the blade with visible screws. The handle is designed for comfortable, secure holding, with a closed grip and a finger guard for safety. There are visible brand markings and text on the blade, indicating manufacturer details. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for manual cutting tasks in construction, carpentry, or general urban maintenance.
description: A hand saw with a metallic toothed blade and a black-and-yellow ergonomic handle, designed for manual wood cutting. The handle features a closed grip and safety guard, with visible brand markings on the blade.
description_view_0: The saw is shown from the side, displaying the full length of the toothed blade and the ergonomic handle with visible brand markings.
description_view_1: The saw is viewed from the tip, showing the thin profile of the blade and the end of the handle, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the saw is visible, again showing the full blade and handle, but with the teeth and handle details mirrored.
description_view_3: The saw is viewed from the handle end, highlighting the thickness of the handle and the narrowness of the blade.
attribute_brand_logo: There is a visible brand logo and text on the blade, located near the handle, with readable text including 'FatMax' and other manufacturer details.
attribute_handle_design: Single closed-loop handle, ergonomically shaped with a finger guard, made of black and yellow plastic with possible rubberized grip for comfort and safety.
